scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "corepack pnpm --filter @quanyu/web dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @quanyu/api dev"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @quanyu/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @quanyu/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @quanyu/web build
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @quanyu/web lint && corepack pnpm --filter @quanyu/api lint
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @quanyu/shared typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @quanyu/api typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @quanyu/web typecheck
